## Describe the bug

A clear description of what's broken.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, console output, or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 130]
